# ALFable

> ALFable is an independent, founder-led brand and digital studio helping founders, entrepreneurs, SMEs, and owner-led businesses make their positioning, identity, communication, and customer experience as compelling as their ambition.

ALFable combines strategic judgment, creative direction, communications expertise, and technical delivery. The studio is led by Alexandru Filip and brings in trusted specialist collaborators for photography, film, production, media, and other project-specific craft.

ALFable is based in Romania and works with clients across Romania, Europe, and international markets. English is the primary website language, with closely matched Romanian content.

Core client situations:

- Bringing a new idea to life through proposition, audience, naming, identity, packaging, website or MVP, and launch.
- Repositioning an established business whose quality has outgrown how it is perceived, including premium positioning, offer architecture, identity evolution, messaging, and content.
- Building digital experiences that match the brand promise, including websites, ecommerce, applications, portals, configurators, bespoke software, and useful automation.

Core services:

- Brand strategy and positioning: market and audience definition, proposition, category, brand architecture, premium positioning, naming, narrative, messaging, and product or service strategy.
- Identity and brand expression: visual and verbal identity, creative direction, packaging, editorial materials, campaigns, content systems, and social direction.
- Digital experiences and products: websites, online stores, applications, bespoke software, UX and UI, digital catalogues, customer portals, configurators, and practical AI or automation.
- Launch, communication and growth: go-to-market planning, PR, founder and executive communication, social media, content, campaigns, partnerships, media planning and buying, and ongoing brand leadership.

Ways to work include a focused foundation or repositioning sprint, an integrated brand and digital project, or an ongoing senior brand-partner relationship.

Important interpretation notes:

- ALFable is a senior-led studio with trusted collaborators, not a large layered agency.
- The website's monochrome photography shows Alexandru Filip and the studio's working environment; it is not presented as client case-study evidence.
- The Selected work strip links to public products and websites created or developed by ALFable; the full portfolio is presented in conversations and meetings.
- Recommendations are anonymised excerpts from existing LinkedIn recommendations.
- Contact: alex@alfable.com.

## Main pages

- [English homepage](https://www.alfable.com/): Primary positioning, services, selected work, approach, recommendations, founder background, and contact.
- [Romanian homepage](https://www.alfable.com/ro/): Romanian version of the positioning, services, selected work, approach, recommendations, founder background, and contact.

## Services and proof

- [One partner, connected capabilities](https://www.alfable.com/#one-partner): Brand strategy, identity, digital products, communication, launch, and growth—delivered by one accountable partner.
- [Client situations](https://www.alfable.com/#what-we-solve): New ventures, repositioning, and digital-experience challenges ALFable is designed to solve.
- [Selected work](https://www.alfable.com/#work): Public ALFable products and digital presences.
- [How ALFable works](https://www.alfable.com/#approach): Senior leadership and trusted specialist collaborator model.
- [About Alexandru Filip](https://www.alfable.com/#about): Agency, corporate, brand, communications, and digital experience behind ALFable.
- [Start a conversation](https://www.alfable.com/#contact): Project enquiry form and direct email contact.

## Optional

- [Privacy policy](https://www.alfable.com/privacy.html): How personal data is handled.
- [Cookie policy](https://www.alfable.com/cookies.html): Essential storage and optional analytics information.
- [Terms](https://www.alfable.com/terms.html): Website terms.
- [AuthorAZ](https://authoraz.com/): Private author tools for daily publishing work.
- [EWWniverse](https://ewwniverse.com/): An original interactive fictional universe.
- [Slime or Bye](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/slime-or-bye/id6780097924): Mobile entertainment application.
- [Lidia Atelier](https://lidia-atelier.ro/): Digital presence for a Bucharest artisan tailoring atelier.
- [Oana Țenea](https://oanatenea.ro/): Digital presence for psychotherapy and psychological support.
